005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff;
007
008import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.VoltageOut;
009import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Motors;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter.ShooterState;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.util.LoggedSignals;
018import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.BStream;
019import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.filters.BDebounce;
020
021import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
022
023public class HandoffImpl extends Handoff {
024
025    private final TalonFX handoffMotor;
026
027    private final VoltageOut handoffController;
028
029    private final LoggedSignals signals;
030
031    private final BStream handoffStalling;
032
033    public HandoffImpl() {
034        handoffMotor = new TalonFX(Ports.Handoff.HANDOFF_MOTOR, Settings.CANBUS);
035        handoffController = new VoltageOut(getState().getTargetVoltage()).withEnableFOC(true);
036        signals = new LoggedSignals(LoggedSignals.SignalLocation.CANIVORE, "Handoff/",
037                handoffMotor.getSupplyCurrent(),
038                handoffMotor.getStatorCurrent(),
039                handoffMotor.getVelocity());
040        // Configuring
041        Motors.Handoff.HANDOFF_MOTOR_CONFIG.configure(handoffMotor);
042        handoffStalling = BStream.create(
043                () -> Math.abs(handoffMotor.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble()) > Settings.Handoff.STALL_CURRENT)
044                .filtered(new BDebounce.Rising(Settings.Handoff.STALL_DEBOUNCE));
045    }
046
047    @Override
048    protected void stopMotors() {
049        handoffMotor.stopMotor();
050    }
051
052    @Override
053    protected boolean handoffStalling() {
054        return handoffStalling.get();
055    };
056
057    @Override
058    public void periodic() {
059        // States
060        final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
061        final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
062        if (!(swerve.isAlignedToTarget(Field.getHubPose()))
063                && shooter.getState() == ShooterState.SHOOT) {
064            setState(HandoffState.IDLE);
065        }
066        // TODO: consider relaxing tolerances for ferrying
067        if (!(swerve.isAlignedToTarget(Field.getFerryZonePose(swerve.getPose().getTranslation())))
068                && shooter.getState() == ShooterState.FERRY) {
069            setState(HandoffState.IDLE);
070        }
071
072        // Control
073        final Voltage voltage = handoffStalling.get()
074                ? Handoff.HandoffState.REVERSE.getTargetVoltage()
075                : getState().getTargetVoltage();
076        final VoltageOut handoffControl = handoffController.withOutput(voltage);
077        // Apply
078        handoffMotor.setControl(handoffControl);
079        // Logging
080        this.signals.logAll();
081        super.periodic();
082    }
083}
